definition: Formula-level expression for the arising side of sakkāya understood through the five clung-to heaps.
notes: Use this phrase when the text explicitly treats appropriated identity dynamically. The formula inherits the technical sakkāya default identity and should not be flattened into self-language. The personal identity alternate is allowed only when explanatory prose needs the fuller phrase.

context_rules.context: In direct doctrinal translation of the formula
In explanatory prose where a fuller phrase is needed
context_rules.notes: Use this as a controlled alternate for clarification.

example_phrases.notes: Formula line tied to the five clung-to heaps by the governing sakkāya entry.
